examples.no: bilmodellen har spist seg inn i markedet
examples.en: the car model has eaten its way into the market

examples.no: bortelaget spiser seg inn i kampen
examples.en: the away team is playing its way back into the match

examples.no: flammene har begynt å spise seg oppover veggen
examples.en: the flames have begun to eat their way up the wall

examples.no: frosten spiste seg nedover i jorda
examples.en: the frost ate its way down into the ground
